prompt_text:
### Demographics: 38-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 4 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia; Worsening edema and dyspnea over the last 3 months.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~18.8 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Lobeglitazone 0.5mg once daily; Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 58.8 kg; Height 153.7 cm; BMI 24.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 126/89 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.8%; 9 months ago 9.1%; 6 months ago 8.6%; 3 months ago 8.1%; current 6.9%), FPG (12 months ago 252mg/dL; 9 months ago 254mg/dL; 6 months ago 192mg/dL; 3 months ago 178mg/dL; current 180mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 57.8kg; 9 months ago 60.2kg; 6 months ago 61.9kg; 3 months ago 61.9kg; current 58.8kg), Height (12 months ago 153.7cm; 9 months ago 153.7cm; 6 months ago 153.7cm; 3 months ago 153.7cm; current 153.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 26.0kg/m²; current 24.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 124mmHg; 9 months ago 129mmHg; 6 months ago 127mmHg; 3 months ago 130mmHg; current 126mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 89mmHg; 9 months ago 87mmHg; 6 months ago 85mmHg; 3 months ago 89mmHg; current 89mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 40U/L; 9 months ago 48U/L; 6 months ago 40U/L; 3 months ago 48U/L; current 46U/L), AST (12 months ago 50U/L; 9 months ago 55U/L; 6 months ago 50U/L; 3 months ago 48U/L; current 53U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 9.0mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 9.1mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 4.9mL/min/1.73m²; current 6mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 253mg/g; 9 months ago 198mg/g; 6 months ago 320mg/g; 3 months ago 358mg/g; current 239mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 91mg/dL; 9 months ago 92mg/dL; 6 months ago 94mg/dL; 3 months ago 93mg/dL; current 90mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 38mg/dL; 9 months ago 37mg/dL; 6 months ago 37mg/dL; 3 months ago 40mg/dL; current 39mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 125mg/dL; 9 months ago 146mg/dL; 6 months ago 128mg/dL; 3 months ago 146mg/dL; current 135mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
